plugin.name: many-ai
plugin.description: Chat with an AI model through the Groq API, with search, memory, and extra tools

errors.missingApiKey: My Groq API key isn't configured. Ask the bot admin to set GROQ_API_KEY in ~/.manybot/manybot.toml.
errors.toolError: Something went wrong trying to use {{tool}}.
errors.rateLimit: Rate limit reached, try again in a bit.
errors.rateLimitWithRetry: Rate limit reached. Try again in {{retryIn}}.
errors.allKeysRateLimit: None of the configured API keys are working right now (rate limit, invalid key, or a Groq hiccup). Try again in a moment.
errors.emptyReply: Couldn't put together a reply just now. Mind repeating or rephrasing that?

tools.stickerNotFound: I couldn't find a sticker called "{{name}}".

settings.adminOnly: Only group admins can change these settings.
settings.disabled: AI disabled for this chat. Send "!ai-settings on" to re-enable.
settings.interventionOn: Passive intervention enabled — I may jump in on unanswered questions, clear help requests, or corrections, even without being called.
settings.interventionOff: Passive intervention disabled — I'll only respond when directly triggered.
settings.interventionUsage: Usage: "!ai-settings intervention on" or "!ai-settings intervention off".
settings.status: AI: {{enabled}} | Passive intervention: {{intervention}} | Audio transcription: {{transcribe}} | Stickers: {{sticker}}
settings.saveError: Couldn't save that setting — settings storage might not be available yet.
settings.transcribeOn: Background audio transcription enabled — voice notes in this chat become searchable text.
settings.transcribeOff: Background audio transcription disabled. Replying to a specific voice note to ask about it still works.
settings.transcribeUsage: Usage: "!ai-settings transcribe on" or "!ai-settings transcribe off".
settings.stickerOn: Stickers enabled - I may send one when it fits.
settings.stickerOff: Stickers disabled - I won't send any anymore.
settings.stickerUsage: Usage: "!ai-settings sticker on" or "!ai-settings sticker off".

logs.maxIterationsReached: resolveReply: max iterations reached without a final reply
logs.missingApiKeyWarning: GROQ_API_KEY not configured — Many won't respond until this is set in ~/.manybot/manybot.toml.

shouldRespond.quotedError: Error fetching quoted message → staying silent ({{error}})

logs.noMediaResponse: I only understand text messages. I still can't read images, stickers, audio, or video.
logs.transcriptionFailed: I couldn't transcribe that audio. Try again in a bit.
logs.transcriptionDisabled: I don't process voice notes in this chat yet. Enable it with "!ai-settings transcribe on", or just reply to a specific one asking about it.
